flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Minnesota State University Moorhead vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.1k vs 4.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Minnesota State University Moorhead fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8k → 3.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Minnesota State University Moorhead rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.5k → $10.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Minnesota State University Moorhead fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
